title: CobbleWeather [Cobblemon Addon]
description: Adds weather mechanics to Cobblemon where specific weather conditions grant wild Pokémon better IV stats.
body:
**CobbleWeather** introduces meaningful weather mechanics to Cobblemon. Matching your hunt to the current weather rewards you with high-IV Pokémon spawns.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b5764a284ff62088594790c027d906a9ef60368.png)

Introduces a new **Sandstorm** weather event. During rain, Desert and Badlands biomes are now filled with immersive sand particles.

![sandstorm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ef2b6918d9cf88353ab2bd2fc559e911d0e7f96_0.webp)
